task.title: EPIC: Schema Integrity â€” statusâ†”pipelineStage sync + Studio consistency
task.description: Fix three systemic data integrity bugs: (1) cleo complete/cancel does not advance pipelineStage to terminal; (2) Studio Pipeline Kanban DONE/CANCELLED columns show 0 even though tasks have status=done/cancelled; (3) Epic progress counting uses inconsistent basis. RCASD sub-tasks decompose the fix.
acceptance: cleo complete auto-advances pipelineStage to a terminal value (contribution)
cleo cancel auto-sets pipelineStage to a terminal cancelled marker
Idempotent backfill migration updates existing done/cancelled rows
Studio pipeline view DONE column shows every task where status=done
Studio pipeline view CANCELLED column shows every task where status=cancelled
Studio dashboard epic progress uses consistent direct-children basis
All new behavior is unit-tested and passes quality gates
